Appearance

Andrew

MARCONI

Most technology asks you to trust it.
I help brands build the kind that earns it.

I write

About what credibility means when anything can be faked. A book, a Substack, and thirty years of field notes.

Read the Substack

I build

Tools and experiments, shipped in the open. The plumbing interests me as much as the pitch.

See the repos

I advise

Brands that want trust they can prove, not just a vibe-check. That work happens at Five59 Labs.

Visit Five59 Labs
